name: FireFly Metals Ltd
description: FireFly Metals Ltd, formerly Auteco Minerals Ltd, is an Australian mineral exploration company focused on advancing high-grade metal projects. The company's flagship asset is the Green Bay Copper-Gold Project in Newfoundland, Canada, which contains a significant copper-gold resource. FireFly Metals is dedicated to expanding this resource through systematic exploration and drilling, while also holding interest in the Pickle Crow Gold Project in Ontario, Canada, and other exploration assets in Western Australia.
